runs.explanation: The function incorrectly compares an absolute timestamp (`now`) with a value (`ttl`) that, by convention, represents a relative duration. This comparison on line 61 is logically flawed because it treats a time-to-live value as an absolute expiry timestamp, causing valid cache entries to be incorrectly identified as expired.
